---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an addition or change to the template
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: srinitude
---

## Problem

What limitation or gap does this address?

## Proposed Change

Describe the change to `.pi/SYSTEM.md`, `AGENTS.md`, or the repo structure.

## Pi Docs/Source Reference

Link to the Pi documentation or source behavior that supports this change. Changes must be backed by real Pi behavior, not aspirational features.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you thought about.
